description: The VibrationDeviceRelay component recieves haptics events and relays them to other vibration recievers.

fields.TargetComponent: The component to relay the vibration event to.
fields.DynamicLookupTarget: The slot to look for components in to send the vibration event to.

usage: Attach to a slot like the hands or other slots that can recieve haptics, then specify a target or component that the vibrations should be relayed to.
